resourceTemplates.name: pinterest-search
resourceTemplates.title: Search Pinterest
resourceTemplates.description: Searches Pinterest for public pins and supports pagination with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: pinterest-pin
resourceTemplates.title: Get Pinterest pin
resourceTemplates.description: Returns details for a Pinterest pin. Use either a pin `url` or `pin_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: pinterest-board
resourceTemplates.title: Get Pinterest board
resourceTemplates.description: Returns pins from a Pinterest board. Use `url` or `board_id`, and paginate with `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: pinterest-user-boards
resourceTemplates.title: Get Pinterest user boards
resourceTemplates.description: Returns boards for a Pinterest user by profile `url` or `username`, with optional pagination via `cursor`.
